CVE-2014-9474.title: Buffer overflow in the mpfr_strtofr function in GNU MPFR before 3 ...
CVE-2014-9474.description: Buffer overflow in the mpfr_strtofr function in GNU MPFR before 3.1.2-p11 allows context-dependent attackers to have unspecified impact via vectors related to incorrect documentation for mpn_set_str.
